Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit or make a purchase from our website.

Information We Collect

We collect personal information such as your name, email address, and any other information you voluntarily provide when you fill out our contact forms.

How We Use Your Information

Your personal information is used to respond to your inquiries, provide requested services, and for marketing purposes if you have opted in.

Sharing Your Information

We do not share your personal information with third parties except when required by law or necessary for providing services you have requested.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. Please contact us if you wish to exercise any of these rights.

Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about our privacy policy, please reach out to us at: gianpaolo(dot)laurenzano00(at)gmail(dot)com

Copyright © Laurenzano Gianpaolo 2024
